records.m_Talk_ENG: That person's name is Ravi. He is your father.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That person's name is Ravi. He is your father.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That person's name is Ravi. He is your father.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ravi... My father...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ravi... My father...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ravi... My father...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing a projection of my father's memory here... can only mean that...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing a projection of my father's memory here... can only mean that...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing a projection of my father's memory here... can only mean that...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you have been using that vile trick to hide from us. It took us quite the trouble to find you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you have been using that vile trick to hide from us. It took us quite the trouble to find you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you have been using that vile trick to hide from us. It took us quite the trouble to find you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... we've been caught.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... we've been caught.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... we've been caught.

records.m_Talk_ENG: F-father...
records.m_Talk_DEU: F-father...
records.m_Talk_FRA: F-father...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Asha! That man is not the father you think he is!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Asha! That man is not the father you think he is!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Asha! That man is not the father you think he is!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Asha! Come to your senses!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Asha! Come to your senses!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Asha! Come to your senses!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did you do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did you do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did you do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She is an impurity that used to follow Aditya.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She is an impurity that used to follow Aditya.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She is an impurity that used to follow Aditya.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I had swallowed her to lure Aditya here, but it seems that she had something interesting in her possession.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had swallowed her to lure Aditya here, but it seems that she had something interesting in her possession.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had swallowed her to lure Aditya here, but it seems that she had something interesting in her possession.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I have decided to give the impurity a very small chance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I have decided to give the impurity a very small chance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I have decided to give the impurity a very small chance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She will now probably be faced with a choice while looking back on the past with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She will now probably be faced with a choice while looking back on the past with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She will now probably be faced with a choice while looking back on the past with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whether she will accept us and move on, or sleep in eternal lies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whether she will accept us and move on, or sleep in eternal lies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whether she will accept us and move on, or sleep in eternal lies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not tarnish his honor any further.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not tarnish his honor any further.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not tarnish his honor any further.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever you do, you will never become Ravi.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever you do, you will never become Ravi.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever you do, you will never become Ravi.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am Ravi. I have his appearance, his memories, and everything else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am Ravi. I have his appearance, his memories, and everything else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am Ravi. I have his appearance, his memories, and everything else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone who is as lukewarm and complicated as you does not deserve the name of the flame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone who is as lukewarm and complicated as you does not deserve the name of the flame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone who is as lukewarm and complicated as you does not deserve the name of the flame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are Ahab. That's a name that befits you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are Ahab. That's a name that befits you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are Ahab. That's a name that befits you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You cannot ignite a flame like him, and I have never allowed that name to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You cannot ignite a flame like him, and I have never allowed that name to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You cannot ignite a flame like him, and I have never allowed that name to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am not Ahab... Hearing you say that when you should be joining us is... heartbreaking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am not Ahab... Hearing you say that when you should be joining us is... heartbreaking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am not Ahab... Hearing you say that when you should be joining us is... heartbreaking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahab...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahab...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahab...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This conversation is over. Stand there for a moment and witness the impurity become one with us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This conversation is over. Stand there for a moment and witness the impurity become one with us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This conversation is over. Stand there for a moment and witness the impurity become one with us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh... I can't move...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh... I can't move...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh... I can't move...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her choice will turn me into Ravi and not Ahab.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her choice will turn me into Ravi and not Ahab.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her choice will turn me into Ravi and not Ahab.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the place where my mother passed away...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the place where my mother passed away...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the place where my mother passed away...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rations came in today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rations came in today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rations came in today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mom? B-but you are...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mom? B-but you are...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mom? B-but you are...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dad will soon be home, so could you help me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dad will soon be home, so could you help me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dad will soon be home, so could you help me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Am I dreaming right now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Am I dreaming right now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Am I dreaming right now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you muttering to yourself about? Aren't you going to help?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you muttering to yourself about? Aren't you going to help?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you muttering to yourself about? Aren't you going to help?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-yes! Coming!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-yes! Coming!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-yes! Coming!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was funny to hear him be excited to see how much you've grown.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was funny to hear him be excited to see how much you've grown.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was funny to hear him be excited to see how much you've grown.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Asha, don't be shy when Dad gets home, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Asha, don't be shy when Dad gets home, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Asha, don't be shy when Dad gets home, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Mom! When was I ever shy?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Mom! When was I ever shy?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Mom! When was I ever shy?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. You're right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. You're right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. You're right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think Dad's home. Go welcome him home.94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think Dad's home. Go welcome him home.94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think Dad's home. Go welcome him home.94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! Coming!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! Coming!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! Coming!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dad...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dad...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dad...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's you, right? I missed you so much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's you, right? I missed you so much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's you, right? I missed you so much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I missed you too, Asha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I missed you too, Asha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I missed you too, Asha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go inside. There is a lot to talk about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go inside. There is a lot to talk about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go inside. There is a lot to talk about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're a soldier? Isn't that dangerous? And you're also hunting C.O.s...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're a soldier? Isn't that dangerous? And you're also hunting C.O.s...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're a soldier? Isn't that dangerous? And you're also hunting C.O.s...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's for the good of the world. I've never regretted it once.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's for the good of the world. I've never regretted it once.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's for the good of the world. I've never regretted it once.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm relieved to see that you grew up well even without me. Wasn't it rough?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm relieved to see that you grew up well even without me. Wasn't it rough?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm relieved to see that you grew up well even without me. Wasn't it rough?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wanted to get out of this place even though I was young
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wanted to get out of this place even though I was young
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wanted to get out of this place even though I was young

records.m_Talk_ENG: What about Mom? She was working so hard to feed me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What about Mom? She was working so hard to feed me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What about Mom? She was working so hard to feed me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Countless casualties arose when a large-scale abnormal phenomenon occurred in a Gronian refugee camp...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Countless casualties arose when a large-scale abnormal phenomenon occurred in a Gronian refugee camp...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Countless casualties arose when a large-scale abnormal phenomenon occurred in a Gronian refugee camp...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something just...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something just...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something just...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, child. It's been a long time since we last met. Would you like to go out with your dad?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, child. It's been a long time since we last met. Would you like to go out with your dad?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, child. It's been a long time since we last met. Would you like to go out with your dad?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, Dad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, Dad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, Dad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This place sure is as peaceful as ever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This place sure is as peaceful as ever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This place sure is as peaceful as ever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's only a matter of time. The Corruption ray density spreading across Gronia is rising.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's only a matter of time. The Corruption ray density spreading across Gronia is rising.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's only a matter of time. The Corruption ray density spreading across Gronia is rising.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Soon, even this refugee camp will...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Soon, even this refugee camp will...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Soon, even this refugee camp will...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, how about you leave with me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, how about you leave with me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, how about you leave with me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave... with you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave... with you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave... with you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. You'll join me in saving the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. You'll join me in saving the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. You'll join me in saving the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Over there, you won't have to worry about poverty, being alone, or seeing your loved ones die.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Over there, you won't have to worry about poverty, being alone, or seeing your loved ones die.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Over there, you won't have to worry about poverty, being alone, or seeing your loved ones die.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think? Isn't it the life you always wanted?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think? Isn't it the life you always wanted?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think? Isn't it the life you always wanted?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The life... I always wanted...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The life... I always wanted...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The life... I always wanted...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wanted to show you more places and let you experience new things...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wanted to show you more places and let you experience new things...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wanted to show you more places and let you experience new things...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But at least I got to see her face for one last time. Even if she might not be able to remember me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But at least I got to see her face for one last time. Even if she might not be able to remember me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But at least I got to see her face for one last time. Even if she might not be able to remember me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I wanted to travel with my father.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I wanted to travel with my father.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I wanted to travel with my father.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So much so that I memorized each country's geography and tourist attractions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So much so that I memorized each country's geography and tourist attractions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So much so that I memorized each country's geography and tourist attractions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hoped that my father would return so I could hold his hand and go to places I've never been.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hoped that my father would return so I could hold his hand and go to places I've never been.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hoped that my father would return so I could hold his hand and go to places I've never been.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. And now, you can.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. And now, you can.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. And now, you can.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before that, could you give back the thing I left you with?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before that, could you give back the thing I left you with?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before that, could you give back the thing I left you with?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The... thing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The... thing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The... thing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Without it, Dad can't be himself.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Without it, Dad can't be himself.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Without it, Dad can't be himself.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: We need it so we can go together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We need it so we can go together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We need it so we can go together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because we must chase the light of the sun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because we must chase the light of the sun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because we must chase the light of the sun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Countless casualties arose when a large-scale abnormal phenomenon occurred in a Gronian refugee camp.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Countless casualties arose when a large-scale abnormal phenomenon occurred in a Gronian refugee camp.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Countless casualties arose when a large-scale abnormal phenomenon occurred in a Gronian refugee camp.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The extent of the damage is still unknown, but the damage is expected to be severe due to the large number of unprotected refugees...94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: The extent of the damage is still unknown, but the damage is expected to be severe due to the large number of unprotected refugees...94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: The extent of the damage is still unknown, but the damage is expected to be severe due to the large number of unprotected refugees...94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mom!! My mom's under there!! Someone save her!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mom!! My mom's under there!! Someone save her!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mom!! My mom's under there!! Someone save her!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The monsters are getting close to her!!! Not me! Save my mom!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The monsters are getting close to her!!! Not me! Save my mom!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The monsters are getting close to her!!! Not me! Save my mom!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: MOMMM!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: MOMMM!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: MOMMM!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her body was never found.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her body was never found.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her body was never found.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I had to send her off without even leaving a gravestone because I didn't have any money.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had to send her off without even leaving a gravestone because I didn't have any money.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had to send her off without even leaving a gravestone because I didn't have any money.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I roamed the world with the little compensation that they gave me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I roamed the world with the little compensation that they gave me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I roamed the world with the little compensation that they gave me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I traveled to places that I had once memorized in hopes of going there together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I traveled to places that I had once memorized in hopes of going there together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I traveled to places that I had once memorized in hopes of going there together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If only... you came to me sooner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If only... you came to me sooner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If only... you came to me sooner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... I would've at least been fooled into thinking that you were my father.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... I would've at least been fooled into thinking that you were my father.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... I would've at least been fooled into thinking that you were my father.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What... do you mean by that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What... do you mean by that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What... do you mean by that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Especially to you, Ravi. Didn't you say you wanted to go traveling with your daughter?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Especially to you, Ravi. Didn't you say you wanted to go traveling with your daughter?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Especially to you, Ravi. Didn't you say you wanted to go traveling with your daughter?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't roam the world on my own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't roam the world on my own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't roam the world on my own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My father... said that he took me all over the world after Mom had passed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My father... said that he took me all over the world after Mom had passed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My father... said that he took me all over the world after Mom had passed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now thinking back on it, there were quite a few strange things about it. I wonder why I didn't suspect any.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now thinking back on it, there were quite a few strange things about it. I wonder why I didn't suspect any.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now thinking back on it, there were quite a few strange things about it. I wonder why I didn't suspect any.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end... even my memory was altered. Due to that damned C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end... even my memory was altered. Due to that damned C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end... even my memory was altered. Due to that damned C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you really are my father... then say my name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you really are my father... then say my name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you really are my father... then say my name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you can't. Because my name was never important to you in the first place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, you can't. Because my name was never important to you in the first place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, you can't. Because my name was never important to you in the first place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only thing you wanted from me was the compass my father left me, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only thing you wanted from me was the compass my father left me, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only thing you wanted from me was the compass my father left me, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only things you know about him are the memories of his fights.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only things you know about him are the memories of his fights.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only things you know about him are the memories of his fights.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...She's gone. If she had absorbed her original, she wouldn't have been this unstable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...She's gone. If she had absorbed her original, she wouldn't have been this unstable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...She's gone. If she had absorbed her original, she wouldn't have been this unstable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-absorb her original? The Shadow?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-absorb her original? The Shadow?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-absorb her original? The Shadow?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doppelganger-type Shadows want to absorb their original human to become whole.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doppelganger-type Shadows want to absorb their original human to become whole.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doppelganger-type Shadows want to absorb their original human to become whole.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because by doing so, they will make the original's strength and memories their own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because by doing so, they will make the original's strength and memories their own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because by doing so, they will make the original's strength and memories their own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You couldn't absorb him, could you?94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: You couldn't absorb him, could you?94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: You couldn't absorb him, could you?94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm never giving you the compass.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm never giving you the compass.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm never giving you the compass.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am not giving my keepsake to a C.O. that dishonors my father.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am not giving my keepsake to a C.O. that dishonors my father.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am not giving my keepsake to a C.O. that dishonors my father.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seems like you need it for your plans, don't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seems like you need it for your plans, don't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seems like you need it for your plans, don't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha, haha. Yeah. That's why you swallowed me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha, haha. Yeah. That's why you swallowed me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha, haha. Yeah. That's why you swallowed me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But since you have shown your ugly true colors... it's over, C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But since you have shown your ugly true colors... it's over, C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But since you have shown your ugly true colors... it's over, C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As long as I have my father's will with me, I will never surrender to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As long as I have my father's will with me, I will never surrender to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As long as I have my father's will with me, I will never surrender to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All I want to do right now is give up. I'm weak, I'm afraid of dying, and also not a Counter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All I want to do right now is give up. I'm weak, I'm afraid of dying, and also not a Counter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All I want to do right now is give up. I'm weak, I'm afraid of dying, and also not a Counter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... I must get back on my feet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... I must get back on my feet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... I must get back on my feet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because my father would've done the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because my father would've done the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because my father would've done the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have accepted the truth, so I can't hang on to the past anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have accepted the truth, so I can't hang on to the past anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have accepted the truth, so I can't hang on to the past anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He sacrificed his life for everyone. So, I must also not stop here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He sacrificed his life for everyone. So, I must also not stop here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He sacrificed his life for everyone. So, I must also not stop here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is... the way my father and I will move forward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is... the way my father and I will move forward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is... the way my father and I will move forward.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That person's name is Ravi. He is your father.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That person's name is Ravi. He is your father.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That person's name is Ravi. He is your father.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ravi... My father...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ravi... My father...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ravi... My father...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing a projection of my father's memory here... can only mean that...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing a projection of my father's memory here... can only mean that...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing a projection of my father's memory here... can only mean that...

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you have been using that vile trick to hide from us. It took us quite the trouble to find you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you have been using that vile trick to hide from us. It took us quite the trouble to find you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you have been using that vile trick to hide from us. It took us quite the trouble to find you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So... we've been caught.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So... we've been caught.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So... we've been caught.

root.m_Talk_ENG: F-father...
root.m_Talk_DEU: F-father...
root.m_Talk_FRA: F-father...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Asha! That man is not the father you think he is!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Asha! That man is not the father you think he is!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Asha! That man is not the father you think he is!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Asha! Come to your senses!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Asha! Come to your senses!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Asha! Come to your senses!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What did you do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What did you do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What did you do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She is an impurity that used to follow Aditya.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She is an impurity that used to follow Aditya.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She is an impurity that used to follow Aditya.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I had swallowed her to lure Aditya here, but it seems that she had something interesting in her possession.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I had swallowed her to lure Aditya here, but it seems that she had something interesting in her possession.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I had swallowed her to lure Aditya here, but it seems that she had something interesting in her possession.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, I have decided to give the impurity a very small chance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, I have decided to give the impurity a very small chance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, I have decided to give the impurity a very small chance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She will now probably be faced with a choice while looking back on the past with me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She will now probably be faced with a choice while looking back on the past with me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She will now probably be faced with a choice while looking back on the past with me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whether she will accept us and move on, or sleep in eternal lies.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whether she will accept us and move on, or sleep in eternal lies.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whether she will accept us and move on, or sleep in eternal lies.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do not tarnish his honor any further.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do not tarnish his honor any further.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do not tarnish his honor any further.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever you do, you will never become Ravi.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever you do, you will never become Ravi.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever you do, you will never become Ravi.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am Ravi. I have his appearance, his memories, and everything else.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am Ravi. I have his appearance, his memories, and everything else.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am Ravi. I have his appearance, his memories, and everything else.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Someone who is as lukewarm and complicated as you does not deserve the name of the flame.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Someone who is as lukewarm and complicated as you does not deserve the name of the flame.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Someone who is as lukewarm and complicated as you does not deserve the name of the flame.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are Ahab. That's a name that befits you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are Ahab. That's a name that befits you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are Ahab. That's a name that befits you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You cannot ignite a flame like him, and I have never allowed that name to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You cannot ignite a flame like him, and I have never allowed that name to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You cannot ignite a flame like him, and I have never allowed that name to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am not Ahab... Hearing you say that when you should be joining us is... heartbreaking.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am not Ahab... Hearing you say that when you should be joining us is... heartbreaking.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am not Ahab... Hearing you say that when you should be joining us is... heartbreaking.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahab...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahab...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahab...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This conversation is over. Stand there for a moment and witness the impurity become one with us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This conversation is over. Stand there for a moment and witness the impurity become one with us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This conversation is over. Stand there for a moment and witness the impurity become one with us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh... I can't move...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh... I can't move...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh... I can't move...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Her choice will turn me into Ravi and not Ahab.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Her choice will turn me into Ravi and not Ahab.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Her choice will turn me into Ravi and not Ahab.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's the place where my mother passed away...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's the place where my mother passed away...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's the place where my mother passed away...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rations came in today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rations came in today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rations came in today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mom? B-but you are...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mom? B-but you are...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mom? B-but you are...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dad will soon be home, so could you help me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dad will soon be home, so could you help me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dad will soon be home, so could you help me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Am I dreaming right now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Am I dreaming right now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Am I dreaming right now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you muttering to yourself about? Aren't you going to help?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you muttering to yourself about? Aren't you going to help?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you muttering to yourself about? Aren't you going to help?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Y-yes! Coming!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Y-yes! Coming!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Y-yes! Coming!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was funny to hear him be excited to see how much you've grown.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was funny to hear him be excited to see how much you've grown.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was funny to hear him be excited to see how much you've grown.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Asha, don't be shy when Dad gets home, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Asha, don't be shy when Dad gets home, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Asha, don't be shy when Dad gets home, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Mom! When was I ever shy?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Mom! When was I ever shy?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Mom! When was I ever shy?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. You're right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. You're right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. You're right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think Dad's home. Go welcome him home.94p
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think Dad's home. Go welcome him home.94p
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think Dad's home. Go welcome him home.94p

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! Coming!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! Coming!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! Coming!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dad...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dad...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dad...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's you, right? I missed you so much.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's you, right? I missed you so much.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's you, right? I missed you so much.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I missed you too, Asha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I missed you too, Asha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I missed you too, Asha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go inside. There is a lot to talk about.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go inside. There is a lot to talk about.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go inside. There is a lot to talk about.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're a soldier? Isn't that dangerous? And you're also hunting C.O.s...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're a soldier? Isn't that dangerous? And you're also hunting C.O.s...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're a soldier? Isn't that dangerous? And you're also hunting C.O.s...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's for the good of the world. I've never regretted it once.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's for the good of the world. I've never regretted it once.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's for the good of the world. I've never regretted it once.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm relieved to see that you grew up well even without me. Wasn't it rough?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm relieved to see that you grew up well even without me. Wasn't it rough?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm relieved to see that you grew up well even without me. Wasn't it rough?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wanted to get out of this place even though I was young
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wanted to get out of this place even though I was young
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wanted to get out of this place even though I was young

root.m_Talk_ENG: What about Mom? She was working so hard to feed me...
root.m_Talk_DEU: What about Mom? She was working so hard to feed me...
root.m_Talk_FRA: What about Mom? She was working so hard to feed me...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Countless casualties arose when a large-scale abnormal phenomenon occurred in a Gronian refugee camp...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Countless casualties arose when a large-scale abnormal phenomenon occurred in a Gronian refugee camp...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Countless casualties arose when a large-scale abnormal phenomenon occurred in a Gronian refugee camp...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Something just...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Something just...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Something just...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, child. It's been a long time since we last met. Would you like to go out with your dad?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, child. It's been a long time since we last met. Would you like to go out with your dad?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, child. It's been a long time since we last met. Would you like to go out with your dad?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, Dad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, Dad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, Dad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This place sure is as peaceful as ever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This place sure is as peaceful as ever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This place sure is as peaceful as ever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's only a matter of time. The Corruption ray density spreading across Gronia is rising.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's only a matter of time. The Corruption ray density spreading across Gronia is rising.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's only a matter of time. The Corruption ray density spreading across Gronia is rising.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Soon, even this refugee camp will...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Soon, even this refugee camp will...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Soon, even this refugee camp will...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, how about you leave with me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, how about you leave with me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, how about you leave with me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leave... with you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leave... with you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leave... with you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. You'll join me in saving the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. You'll join me in saving the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. You'll join me in saving the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Over there, you won't have to worry about poverty, being alone, or seeing your loved ones die.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Over there, you won't have to worry about poverty, being alone, or seeing your loved ones die.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Over there, you won't have to worry about poverty, being alone, or seeing your loved ones die.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think? Isn't it the life you always wanted?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think? Isn't it the life you always wanted?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think? Isn't it the life you always wanted?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The life... I always wanted...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The life... I always wanted...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The life... I always wanted...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wanted to show you more places and let you experience new things...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wanted to show you more places and let you experience new things...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wanted to show you more places and let you experience new things...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But at least I got to see her face for one last time. Even if she might not be able to remember me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But at least I got to see her face for one last time. Even if she might not be able to remember me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But at least I got to see her face for one last time. Even if she might not be able to remember me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I wanted to travel with my father.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I wanted to travel with my father.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I wanted to travel with my father.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So much so that I memorized each country's geography and tourist attractions.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So much so that I memorized each country's geography and tourist attractions.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So much so that I memorized each country's geography and tourist attractions.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hoped that my father would return so I could hold his hand and go to places I've never been.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hoped that my father would return so I could hold his hand and go to places I've never been.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hoped that my father would return so I could hold his hand and go to places I've never been.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. And now, you can.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. And now, you can.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. And now, you can.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Before that, could you give back the thing I left you with?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Before that, could you give back the thing I left you with?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Before that, could you give back the thing I left you with?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The... thing?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The... thing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The... thing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Without it, Dad can't be himself.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Without it, Dad can't be himself.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Without it, Dad can't be himself.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: We need it so we can go together.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We need it so we can go together.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We need it so we can go together.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because we must chase the light of the sun.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because we must chase the light of the sun.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because we must chase the light of the sun.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Countless casualties arose when a large-scale abnormal phenomenon occurred in a Gronian refugee camp.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Countless casualties arose when a large-scale abnormal phenomenon occurred in a Gronian refugee camp.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Countless casualties arose when a large-scale abnormal phenomenon occurred in a Gronian refugee camp.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The extent of the damage is still unknown, but the damage is expected to be severe due to the large number of unprotected refugees...94p
root.m_Talk_DEU: The extent of the damage is still unknown, but the damage is expected to be severe due to the large number of unprotected refugees...94p
root.m_Talk_FRA: The extent of the damage is still unknown, but the damage is expected to be severe due to the large number of unprotected refugees...94p

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mom!! My mom's under there!! Someone save her!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mom!! My mom's under there!! Someone save her!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mom!! My mom's under there!! Someone save her!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The monsters are getting close to her!!! Not me! Save my mom!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The monsters are getting close to her!!! Not me! Save my mom!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The monsters are getting close to her!!! Not me! Save my mom!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: MOMMM!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: MOMMM!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: MOMMM!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Her body was never found.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Her body was never found.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Her body was never found.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I had to send her off without even leaving a gravestone because I didn't have any money.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I had to send her off without even leaving a gravestone because I didn't have any money.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I had to send her off without even leaving a gravestone because I didn't have any money.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I roamed the world with the little compensation that they gave me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I roamed the world with the little compensation that they gave me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I roamed the world with the little compensation that they gave me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I traveled to places that I had once memorized in hopes of going there together.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I traveled to places that I had once memorized in hopes of going there together.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I traveled to places that I had once memorized in hopes of going there together.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If only... you came to me sooner.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If only... you came to me sooner.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If only... you came to me sooner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then... I would've at least been fooled into thinking that you were my father.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then... I would've at least been fooled into thinking that you were my father.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then... I would've at least been fooled into thinking that you were my father.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What... do you mean by that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What... do you mean by that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What... do you mean by that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Especially to you, Ravi. Didn't you say you wanted to go traveling with your daughter?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Especially to you, Ravi. Didn't you say you wanted to go traveling with your daughter?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Especially to you, Ravi. Didn't you say you wanted to go traveling with your daughter?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't roam the world on my own.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't roam the world on my own.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't roam the world on my own.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My father... said that he took me all over the world after Mom had passed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My father... said that he took me all over the world after Mom had passed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My father... said that he took me all over the world after Mom had passed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now thinking back on it, there were quite a few strange things about it. I wonder why I didn't suspect any.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now thinking back on it, there were quite a few strange things about it. I wonder why I didn't suspect any.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now thinking back on it, there were quite a few strange things about it. I wonder why I didn't suspect any.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the end... even my memory was altered. Due to that damned C.O.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the end... even my memory was altered. Due to that damned C.O.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the end... even my memory was altered. Due to that damned C.O.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you really are my father... then say my name.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you really are my father... then say my name.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you really are my father... then say my name.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, you can't. Because my name was never important to you in the first place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, you can't. Because my name was never important to you in the first place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, you can't. Because my name was never important to you in the first place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The only thing you wanted from me was the compass my father left me, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The only thing you wanted from me was the compass my father left me, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The only thing you wanted from me was the compass my father left me, isn't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The only things you know about him are the memories of his fights.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The only things you know about him are the memories of his fights.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The only things you know about him are the memories of his fights.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...She's gone. If she had absorbed her original, she wouldn't have been this unstable.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...She's gone. If she had absorbed her original, she wouldn't have been this unstable.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...She's gone. If she had absorbed her original, she wouldn't have been this unstable.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-absorb her original? The Shadow?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-absorb her original? The Shadow?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-absorb her original? The Shadow?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Doppelganger-type Shadows want to absorb their original human to become whole.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Doppelganger-type Shadows want to absorb their original human to become whole.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Doppelganger-type Shadows want to absorb their original human to become whole.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because by doing so, they will make the original's strength and memories their own.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because by doing so, they will make the original's strength and memories their own.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because by doing so, they will make the original's strength and memories their own.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You couldn't absorb him, could you?94p
root.m_Talk_DEU: You couldn't absorb him, could you?94p
root.m_Talk_FRA: You couldn't absorb him, could you?94p

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm never giving you the compass.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm never giving you the compass.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm never giving you the compass.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am not giving my keepsake to a C.O. that dishonors my father.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am not giving my keepsake to a C.O. that dishonors my father.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am not giving my keepsake to a C.O. that dishonors my father.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seems like you need it for your plans, don't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seems like you need it for your plans, don't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seems like you need it for your plans, don't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha, haha. Yeah. That's why you swallowed me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha, haha. Yeah. That's why you swallowed me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha, haha. Yeah. That's why you swallowed me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But since you have shown your ugly true colors... it's over, C.O.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But since you have shown your ugly true colors... it's over, C.O.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But since you have shown your ugly true colors... it's over, C.O.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As long as I have my father's will with me, I will never surrender to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As long as I have my father's will with me, I will never surrender to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As long as I have my father's will with me, I will never surrender to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All I want to do right now is give up. I'm weak, I'm afraid of dying, and also not a Counter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All I want to do right now is give up. I'm weak, I'm afraid of dying, and also not a Counter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All I want to do right now is give up. I'm weak, I'm afraid of dying, and also not a Counter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... I must get back on my feet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... I must get back on my feet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... I must get back on my feet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because my father would've done the same.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because my father would've done the same.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because my father would've done the same.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have accepted the truth, so I can't hang on to the past anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have accepted the truth, so I can't hang on to the past anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have accepted the truth, so I can't hang on to the past anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: He sacrificed his life for everyone. So, I must also not stop here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He sacrificed his life for everyone. So, I must also not stop here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He sacrificed his life for everyone. So, I must also not stop here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is... the way my father and I will move forward.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is... the way my father and I will move forward.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is... the way my father and I will move forward.
